subject: Rillaboom, a large green gorilla-like Pokemon with a tree-stump drum on its back, raising its arms in a powerful drumming pose
description: A large, muscular green gorilla-like creature stands with arms raised, caught mid-motion in what reads as a drumming or battle stance. On its back sits a massive organic drum made from a tree stump, wrapped with vines and roots. The creature's arms are thick and powerful, its posture dominant and wide. The color palette is bold — green body, brown earthy drum structure, with warm orange-brown tones in the background suggesting a forest or earth setting. The holofoil card art gives the image a shimmery quality. The composition puts the creature at three-quarter scale filling the frame.
foreground: Rillaboom mid-stance with arms raised, tree-drum on back
background: warm earthy tones suggesting forest floor or organic terrain
